common.selectAllVariants: Select all variant groups before adding this product to cart.
common.skuUnavailable: The selected SKU is currently out of stock.
common.agreeDisclaimer: Agree to the CNSnap disclaimer before adding this product to cart.
common.pleaseSelectSkuCart: Please select an available SKU before adding to cart.
common.pleaseAgreeCart: Please agree to the CNSnap disclaimer before adding to cart.
common.pleaseSelectSkuCheckout: Please select an available SKU before checkout.
common.pleaseAgreeCheckout: Please agree to the CNSnap disclaimer before checkout.
common.manualReviewNotice: This item may require manual review before purchase or shipment. Final availability depends on warehouse and carrier rules.
common.wishlistInfo: Wishlist action is reserved for account favorites.
common.diyShortcutInfo: DIY Order shortcut is reserved for manual quote flow.
common.shareInfo: Share action is reserved for the mobile share flow.
common.supportInfo: Support shortcut opens the help and ticket workflow.
common.purchaseWindow: After payment, our team will purchase for you during 09:00-18:00 (UTC+8).
common.disclaimerText: Items are from third-party platforms. CNSnap provides search, purchasing, and forwarding only. We cannot verify quality or authenticity. Using CNSnap means you accept these risks.
common.fetchErrorTitle: We could not load this item from OneBound.
common.fetchErrorDescription: No demo data was used. Please check the OneBound key or source platform availability, then try again.
common.shippingNote: Product checkout covers item cost, domestic seller-to-warehouse shipping, and service fee. International shipping is billed later after the warehouse receives, inspects, packs, and weighs the parcel.
common.buyingNote: CNSnap purchases from the original seller after payment. If seller price, stock, or shipping fee changes, support will confirm before continuing.
common.restrictedNote: Products with batteries, liquids, powders, brands, high value, or sensitive materials may need manual review or a special shipping channel.
common.faqNote: Product price and international shipping are paid separately. You can pay product cost first, then pay the final international shipping fee after warehouse weighing.
